name: NUCHAL CORD
definition: umbilical cord encircling fetal neck: single loop (96%) > 2 loops (2-3%) > 3 or more loops

demographics.Prevalence: 5-29% of pregnancies; increases with fetal age; frequently transient
demographics.Associated with: increased cord length, small fetus, vertex presentation, polyhydramnios

dominant_finding: umbilical cord loop > 360° around fetal neck
discriminating_features: umbilical cord loop > 360° around fetal neck
two adjacent cross sections of cord on longitudinal view of neck (diagnosis facilitated by
"divot" sign = indentation of skin by nuchal cord suggests tight loop
NO effect on fetal MCA + umbilical artery flow velocimetry

general: umbilical cord loop > 360° around fetal neck
